summary: TWO_COLUMN covering map p:ℝ→S¹. LEFT NumberPlane with BLUE unit circle and YELLOW dot at (cos t, sin t) + 2π-trail. RIGHT NumberLine [-2, 14] with GREEN lifted dot at t and full trail. Dashed projection arrow connects lift to image. ValueTracker t_tr sweeps 0→4π. Live t, t mod 2π, ⌊t/2π⌋ winding.
